meta.description: Paste notes or type a topic, AI generates study flashcards. Buy and sell decks on the marketplace.

database.connection: Lazy-init PG pool, SSL + max 12 for Supabase Supavisor

email.usage: Magic link codes for passwordless auth

free.deck_limit_note: Generated decks only; purchased decks don't count

trial.expiry: Exact timestamp (not midnight), checked at request time via middleware

pro.selling_requires: Stripe Connect Express onboarding + seller terms acceptance
pro.downgrade_behavior: Cancelled/failed payment delists all active marketplace listings

core.name: AI Flashcard Generation (Text)
core.description: Paste notes or type a topic, AI generates front/back flashcard pairs
core.details: Groq primary with Gemini fallback, 25 cards suggested / 30 max enforced, rate limited (30 per 15 min)

core.name: AI Flashcard Generation (Photo)
core.description: Upload up to 5 photos of handwritten/printed notes, AI generates flashcards via vision
core.details: Gemini vision API, magic-byte file validation (JPEG/PNG/WebP), 5MB per photo limit, concurrency semaphore (MAX_CONCURRENT_VISION=3)

core.name: Deck Management
core.description: View, browse, and delete flashcard decks
core.details: Decks listed on dashboard with card count, origin badge (generated/purchased), creation date

core.name: Study Sessions
core.description: Flip-card study mode with correct/incorrect tracking
core.details: CSS card flip (perspective + rotateY), session persisted to DB, increments study_score on completion, upserts deck_stats (times_completed, best_accuracy)

core.name: Study Statistics
core.description: Aggregate stats: total sessions, cards studied, total correct, accuracy percentage

core.name: Study History
core.description: Cursor-paginated completed session history with deck titles
core.details: Composite (completed_at, id) cursor, 20 per page, fetches limit+1 for hasMore detection

core.name: Per-Deck Stats
core.description: Times completed and best accuracy per deck

core.name: Dashboard
core.description: User's deck grid with trial banner, study score display, generation CTA
core.details: Shows deck count limits for free tier, purchased deck badges

auth.name: Email/Password Signup
auth.description: Register with email and password, starts 7-day trial
auth.details: bcrypt hashing, JWT in httpOnly cookie, display_name optional

auth.name: Email/Password Login
auth.details: Checks suspension status, checks deleted_at IS NULL

auth.name: Google Sign-In
auth.details: Captures google_user_id and google_avatar_url, auto-links to existing email accounts, creates trial on first login

auth.name: Magic Link Auth
auth.details: Resend API for email delivery, code_hash stored (not plaintext), 10-min expiry, max 3 attempts, rate limited

auth.name: Token Revocation
auth.description: Invalidate all sessions on password change
auth.details: token_revoked_at = NOW() - 1 second, re-issue fresh JWT for current session, requireActiveUser middleware compares iat vs revocation timestamp

auth.name: Soft-Delete Guard
auth.details: deleted_at IS NULL filter on all auth queries, requireActiveUser middleware checks deleted_at

auth.name: Trial Auto-Expiry
auth.description: Trial expiry checked at request time, no cron needed
auth.details: checkTrialExpiry middleware downgrades to free when trial_ends_at has passed

auth.name: CSRF Protection
auth.description: Custom X-Requested-With header on state-changing endpoints
auth.details: requireXHR middleware forces CORS preflight, shared across generate/account/settings routes

marketplace.name: Browse Listings
marketplace.description: Public browsing with search, category filter, and sort
marketplace.details: PostgreSQL tsvector full-text search with GIN index, cursor pagination (20/page), sort by popular/newest/rating/price

marketplace.name: Categories
marketplace.details: Science, Mathematics, History, Languages, Literature, Computer Science, Business, Medical & Health, Psychology, Arts & Music, Law, Engineering, Test Prep. Cached 1 hour.

marketplace.name: Listing Detail
marketplace.description: Full listing view with preview cards, seller info, ratings
marketplace.details: Shows 3 preview cards, price, purchase count, average rating, seller display name

marketplace.name: Purchase Flow
marketplace.description: Buy decks via Stripe Checkout with idempotent fulfillment
marketplace.details: Destination charges with 70/30 split (seller/platform), webhook-driven fulfillment, deck+cards copied in transaction, ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING for idempotency

marketplace.name: Listing Tags
marketplace.description: Up to 5 tags per listing for discovery
marketplace.details: Stored in separate listing_tags table with unique constraint

seller.name: Stripe Connect Onboarding
seller.description: Pro users onboard to Stripe Connect Express for payouts
seller.details: Start onboard, refresh link, return verification. connect_charges_enabled and connect_payouts_enabled tracked via account.updated webhook.

seller.name: Seller Terms
seller.description: Sellers must accept terms before first listing
seller.details: seller_terms_accepted_at and seller_terms_version tracked on users table

seller.name: Create/Edit/Delist/Relist Listings
seller.details: $1-$5 price range, min 10 cards, max 50 active listings per seller, 13 categories, up to 5 tags

seller.name: Seller Dashboard
seller.description: Earnings overview, listing management, Connect status
seller.details: Total earnings, listing stats (active/delisted counts), per-listing sales and revenue

seller.name: Connect Deauthorization Handling
seller.description: If seller disconnects Stripe, all active listings are delisted atomically
seller.details: account.application.deauthorized webhook, single CTE to delist + nullify

ratings_reviews.name: Star Ratings
ratings_reviews.description: 1-5 star ratings with one per user per listing
ratings_reviews.details: Requires purchase + completed study session, atomic SQL update for listing average (no read-modify-write)

ratings_reviews.name: Review Text
ratings_reviews.description: Optional 200-character review text with star rating
ratings_reviews.details: Added in migration 007, length constraint enforced at DB level

ratings_reviews.name: Rating Modal
ratings_reviews.description: Post-study rating prompt for purchased marketplace decks
ratings_reviews.details: Shows after completing study session on purchased deck, only if user hasn't rated yet

moderation.name: Content Flagging
moderation.description: Users can report listings and reviews
moderation.details: Reasons: Inappropriate, Misleading, Spam, Low Quality, Other. Supports both listing and review flag types.

moderation.name: Admin Moderation Queue
moderation.description: Admin page to review and resolve content flags
moderation.details: Actions: dismiss, uphold (delist listing), uphold + suspend user. Admin role required.

moderation.name: User Suspension
moderation.details: Suspended users cannot log in, existing sessions blocked at login check

account_settings.name: Avatar Upload
account_settings.description: Upload profile photo (JPEG/PNG) stored in Supabase Storage
account_settings.details: Magic-byte validation via fileTypeFromBuffer, 2MB limit, old avatar cleaned up on replace, relative path stored in DB, resolved to full URL with cache-busting in sanitizeUser

account_settings.name: Avatar Delete
account_settings.description: Remove profile photo, falls back to Google avatar or initials
account_settings.details: Best-effort storage cleanup, nulls avatar_url in DB

account_settings.name: Profile Page
account_settings.description: Avatar display/upload, inline name edit, stats grid, session history, deck stats
account_settings.details: Promise.allSettled data loading, AbortController cleanup, cursor pagination for history

account_settings.name: Display Name Edit
account_settings.description: Inline editable display name on profile and settings

account_settings.name: Password Change
account_settings.description: Change password with current password verification
account_settings.details: bcrypt verify + rehash (SALT_ROUNDS=12), token revocation with 1-second buffer, fresh JWT re-issued

account_settings.name: Study Preferences
account_settings.description: Card order (shuffle/sequential) and auto-flip timer (0/3/5/10 seconds)
account_settings.details: JSONB column with allowlist validation, application-level deep merge, debounced auto-save (300ms) with serialization queue

account_settings.name: Notification Preferences
account_settings.description: Toggle study reminders and marketplace activity notifications
account_settings.details: Stored in preferences JSONB nested under notifications key

account_settings.name: Data Export
account_settings.description: Download all decks and cards as JSON file
account_settings.details: Rate limited (3 per hour), 500-deck cap, joined query (no N+1), requireActiveUser middleware

account_settings.name: Account Deletion
account_settings.details: Required because purchases FK uses RESTRICT. Scrubs email (→ 'deleted-' || id), display_name, avatar_url, google_avatar_url, password_hash, preferences, google_user_id, stripe IDs, seller terms. Best-effort Stripe subscription cancellation. Typed confirmation modal on frontend.

account_settings.name: Navbar Avatar Dropdown
account_settings.description: User avatar with accessible dropdown menu
account_settings.details: 32px avatar circle (image/initials/Google fallback), ARIA menu semantics, Escape key close, mousedown click-outside, plan badge, links to Profile/Settings/Seller Dashboard

account_settings.name: Settings Page Sections
account_settings.description: Security, Study Preferences, Notifications, Subscription, Seller, Data & Privacy
account_settings.details: Mutual exclusion via busyAction state, connected accounts display (Google status, password status)

subscription.name: Stripe Checkout for Pro
subscription.description: Create Pro subscription via Stripe Checkout session

subscription.name: Subscription Cancellation
subscription.description: Cancel at period end, delists all active marketplace listings on downgrade

subscription.name: Webhook-Driven Status Sync
subscription.description: Platform webhook handles subscription lifecycle events

infrastructure.name: Health Check
infrastructure.description: Health endpoint with DB connection test

infrastructure.name: Rate Limiting
infrastructure.description: Per-endpoint rate limits with JSON error messages
infrastructure.details: Generation (30/15min), export (3/hr), magic link (3/hr per email + 20/hr global)

infrastructure.name: Versioned Migrations
infrastructure.description: 8 sequential SQL migrations tracked in schema_migrations table
infrastructure.details: Each runs in transaction, uses DATABASE_URL_DIRECT to bypass connection pooler

infrastructure.name: Two-Tier Auth Middleware
infrastructure.description: Stateless authenticate (JWT only) + requireActiveUser (DB check for sensitive ops)
infrastructure.details: authenticate exposes req.userId and req.tokenIat; requireActiveUser checks deleted_at and token_revoked_at

infrastructure.name: AI Auto-Fallback
infrastructure.description: If primary AI provider fails, automatically falls back to secondary
infrastructure.details: Groq → Gemini fallback chain, 25-card prompt limit, 30-card hard cap in parseCards()

infrastructure.name: Lazy DB Pool Initialization
infrastructure.description: Database pool initialized on first use, not at import time
infrastructure.details: Avoids ES module import hoisting issue with dotenv

infrastructure.name: Stripe Webhook Signature Verification
infrastructure.description: Raw body parsing before express.json() for Stripe signature verification
infrastructure.details: Two separate webhook endpoints with separate signing secrets (platform + Connect)

infrastructure.name: Trust Proxy
infrastructure.description: Enabled in production for correct IP detection behind Railway/Vercel

ui_ux.name: Landing Page
ui_ux.description: Hero section, how it works, marketplace showcase, pricing comparison

ui_ux.name: Pricing Page
ui_ux.description: Free vs Pro comparison table with CTA buttons

ui_ux.name: Card Flip Animation
ui_ux.description: CSS perspective + rotateY(180deg), no animation library
ui_ux.details: Smooth 3D flip effect during study sessions

ui_ux.name: Warm Parchment Design System
ui_ux.description: Consistent palette: #FAF7F2 background, #1A1614 text, #1B6B5A accent green, #C8A84E accent gold
ui_ux.details: Toast notifications: dark style, top-right position, 12px border radius

ui_ux.name: Responsive Layout
ui_ux.description: Mobile-friendly responsive design across all pages

ui_ux.name: Verify Code Page
ui_ux.description: 6-digit code input for magic link verification

v2.name: BYOK Tier (Bring Your Own Key)
v2.description: Users provide their own AI API key for unlimited generations
v2.notes: Would add a new tier between Free and Pro, or as a Pro add-on

v2.name: Automated Content Moderation
v2.description: AI-powered automated screening of listings before they go live
v2.notes: Run content through AI classifier for policy violations, auto-flag or auto-reject

v2.name: Transactional Emails
v2.description: Email notifications for purchases, sales, account events
v2.notes: Resend already integrated for magic links; extend to purchase confirmations, sale notifications, subscription changes

v2.name: Seller Badges & Trust Indicators
v2.description: Visual badges for top sellers, verified sellers, etc.
v2.notes: Based on sales volume, rating average, account age

v2.name: Flag Abuse Prevention
v2.description: Rate limiting and penalties for serial flaggers
v2.notes: Track flag accuracy per user, reduce flag weight for habitual false reporters

v2.name: Photo Display on Cards
v2.description: Show uploaded photos alongside generated flashcard text
v2.notes: Currently photos are used for generation only and discarded; store and display them on card faces

v2.name: Dark Mode
v2.description: Dark color scheme option across the entire app
v2.notes: Preferences infrastructure already supports it (JSONB column); needs Tailwind dark: variants

v2.name: Seller UX Enhancements
v2.description: Inline listing editing, bulk actions, analytics graphs
v2.notes: Current seller dashboard is functional but minimal; add charts, filters, search

v2.name: Study Score Economy
v2.description: Gamification — leaderboards, streaks, achievements, study score rewards
v2.notes: study_score column exists and increments; needs UI surfaces and game mechanics

v2.name: Notification Email Delivery
v2.description: Actually send notification emails based on user preferences
v2.notes: Preference toggles exist (study_reminders, marketplace_activity) but no email delivery pipeline yet

v2.name: Apple Sign-In
v2.description: Sign in with Apple for iOS parity
v2.notes: Mentioned in auth revamp brainstorm; Google is done, Apple is deferred

v2.name: Testing Suite
v2.notes: No tests exist currently. Need unit tests for route handlers, integration tests for auth flows, E2E tests for critical paths

v2.name: Card Editing
v2.description: Edit individual card front/back text after generation
v2.notes: DeckView page shows cards but has no edit capability

v2.name: Spaced Repetition
v2.description: SM-2 or similar algorithm for optimal review scheduling
v2.notes: Current study mode is simple flip-through; spaced repetition would significantly improve learning outcomes

v2.name: Deck Sharing (Non-Marketplace)
v2.description: Share decks via link without marketplace listing
v2.notes: Free sharing for collaboration, separate from paid marketplace

v2.name: Collaborative Decks
v2.description: Multiple users contribute cards to a shared deck
v2.notes: Would require new permissions model and real-time sync

pages.description: Hero, how it works, marketplace section, pricing
Listing detail, preview cards, buy, report
User's deck grid, trial banner, study score
Card flip study session with rating modal
Avatar, name, stats, history, deck stats
Security, preferences, notifications, subscription, seller, data & privacy

users.description: User accounts with auth, subscription, seller, and preferences data

indexes: idx_study_sessions_user_completed (user_id, completed_at DESC, id DESC) WHERE completed_at IS NOT NULL

marketplace_listings.description: Deck listings for sale on the marketplace
columns: search_vector tsvector GENERATED (title A + description B)

purchases.description: Purchase records with Stripe payment deduplication
purchases.notes: seller_id uses RESTRICT (not CASCADE) — this is why account deletion must be soft-delete

ratings.description: Star ratings with optional review text

content_flags.description: User-submitted reports for listings and reviews

migrations: 008_account_settings.sql — avatar, preferences JSONB, soft-delete, token revocation, cursor pagination index

conventions.toasts: Dark style (#1A1614 bg, white text), top-right, 12px border-radius, 3s duration
conventions.cards: CSS perspective + rotateY(180deg) for flip animation, no library
conventions.fonts: System font stack via Tailwind defaults
